bullets: Decide which games you want to play by reading the booklet and let the games begin. Cheers!
Get a group of friends together, read the warning cards BEFORE play starts and take the car keys from all players.
With 30 drinking games included, if you can guzzle, you can win!
Comes with Warning. May be played without alcohol.
content.description: Invite your friends to partake in 30 thirst-quenching drinking games that will keep everyone amused, entertained, challenged, and satiated. Ping pong & straw pastimes as well as popular card and dice games will keep the good times rolling, making you the life of the party every time you uncork the Guzzler™ game! MAY BE PLAYED BY YOUNGSTER USING POP, JUICE, WATER...

attributes.whats_in_box: 2 ping pong balls, 4 straws, 6 dice, 1 standard card deck, 40 'Tanked' cards, 7 numbered cards, 3 tongue-twister cards, instructions.
